name: v1.3.1 — Rushes Log & Stability Fixes
body:
## DIT Pro v1.3.1 — Stable Release

### New Features

**A. Rushes Log (P0)**
- Generate professional shooting day reports automatically.
- Extract media metadata (resolution, codec, timecode) for video files.
- Export to CSV, TSV, Excel (.xlsx), and PDF.

**B. Stability & Performance (P0)**
- **HDD Capacity Fix**: Fixed a critical overflow bug causing >16TB drives to show 0 bytes capacity.
- **Performance Tuning**: Throttled IPC events to 500ms to prevent CPU overhead and copy slowdowns.
- **Mutex Optimization**: Resolved database lock contention during task initialization.

### Downloads
| Platform | File |
|----------|------|
| macOS (Universal) | `stable-DIT.Pro_1.3.1_universal.dmg` |
| Windows (x64) | `stable-DIT.Pro_1.3.1_x64-setup.exe` |
name: v1.3.1
